about.title: Professional Summary
about.bio: Linux System Administrator with 3+ years of experience managing hosting environments, Linux servers, DNS infrastructure and email systems. Experienced in troubleshooting production infrastructure, managing WordPress migrations and cloud servers. C1 Advanced English.

resume.professional.summary.title: Professional Summary
resume.professional.summary.text: Linux System Administrator with 3+ years of experience managing hosting environments, Linux servers, DNS infrastructure and email systems. Experienced in troubleshooting production infrastructure, managing WordPress migrations and cloud servers. Strong background in hosting operations, server administration and infrastructure support for production environments.

resume.experience.title: Experience
resume.experience.job1.points: Administration and maintenance of Linux hosting servers in production environments
Management and migration of WordPress websites across hosting environments
Configuration and troubleshooting of web servers (Apache and NGINX)
Email infrastructure support including SMTP, IMAP, SPF and DKIM troubleshooting
SSL certificate installation, renewal and troubleshooting
Provided technical support and infrastructure troubleshooting for hosting customers
resume.experience.job2.points: Development and maintenance of websites using HTML, CSS and JavaScript
Frontend layout implementation and visual adjustments
